title: cleome linearifolia
intro: Cleome linearifolia, also known as the Mexican bee plant, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Cleome linearifolia include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Cleome linearifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
